channel.title: Posts on Raffles Xingqi Zhu
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Raffles Xingqi Zhu

item.title: My JOV Abstract Is Now Online
item.description: My Journal of Vision abstract on spatial scrambling and amblyopic letter acuity is now online.

item.title: New arXiv Paper: Stereo Geometry Errors in HMDs
item.description: Our new arXiv paper studies how stereo geometry errors in HMDs affect perceived distance and visuomotor behavior.

item.title: Started my internship at Meta Reality Labs
item.description: I just started an internship on the Display System Research team at Meta Reality Labs.
